description_long: This is a small, single-engine, fixed-wing airplane with a bright yellow fuselage accented by a red stripe along the tail and a black stripe along the side. The wings are mounted high on the fuselage, giving it a high-wing configuration, and the landing gear is fixed in a taildragger arrangement with two main wheels and a small tail wheel. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, featuring a clear canopy with side windows. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer, both painted yellow with red accents. The airplane's surface appears smooth and glossy, likely constructed from lightweight metal or composite materials. This type of aircraft is commonly used for general aviation, training, or recreational flying and could be found parked in urban airfields or small airports.
description: A small, yellow, high-wing airplane with a single nose-mounted propeller, fixed taildragger landing gear, and a forward cockpit with clear windows.
description_view_0: Side view showing the yellow fuselage, high-mounted wing, nose propeller, and taildragger landing gear.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full wingspan, tail section, and the narrow profile of the fuselage.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the propeller and cockpit more visible.
description_view_3: Front view showing the propeller, forward cockpit windows, and the symmetrical high-wing configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and one tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows, likely single or dual seat.
